pages.name: Home
pages.description: Museum homepage introducing the Cheese History Museum and routing visitors to key tasks.
primary_functions: Highlight main actions: plan a visit, explore exhibitions, view the timeline, read articles, find tours/workshops, and shop.
Surface featured exhibits, tours, articles, and shop items related to cheese history.
Provide quick links and promos into Visit, Exhibitions, Timeline, Learn, Tours & Workshops, and Shop sections.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary 'Plan your visit' button or Visit promo tile in the hero/primary sections.
Click 'Explore Exhibitions' call-to-action in the homepage content.
Click 'Cheese Through Time' or timeline promo block.
Click 'Learn' or 'Articles & Resources' promo section.
Click 'Guided Tours & Workshops' promo card.
Click 'Shop Books' or featured books promo section.
Click on a featured exhibit card.
Click on a featured guided tour or workshop card.
Click on a featured article title or image.
Click cart icon in the header from the homepage.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Home' and museum logo linking to index.html.
Default landing page at site root (index.html).

pages.name: Visit & Tickets
pages.description: Central page for practical visit information and booking dated museum entry tickets.
primary_functions: Display visitor information such as opening hours, location, access, and visitor tips.
Provide a 'Tickets & Hours' section with date picker, ticket type selection (e.g., General Museum Entry), and available time slots.
Allow visitors to choose quantities by ticket category (e.g., Adults, Children 6–12) and add a selected timeslot to the cart.
Offer a clear path to view the booking summary via the cart/visit summary page.

incoming_params.description: Preselected visit date in YYYY-MM-DD format for the Tickets & Hours date picker.
Optional ticket type code such as 'general_entry' to preselect in the ticket type section.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' or 'Visit Summary' after adding admission tickets.

access_methods.description: Header nav link labeled 'Visit'.
Footer link labeled 'Visit'.
Linked from homepage call-to-actions, About page, and Contact page directions.

pages.name: Exhibitions
pages.description: Browseable list of museum exhibits and galleries focused on cheese history.
primary_functions: Present an 'Explore Exhibits' call-to-action that reveals or scrolls to the full exhibits list.
Provide filters for region (e.g., Europe), era/time period (including a 'Before 1500' option), and other attributes.
Allow sorting of exhibits by criteria such as 'Estimated Visit Time' from low to high.
List exhibits with key details and support opening individual exhibit detail pages.
Optionally allow adding exhibits directly to the self-guided route from the list.

incoming_params.description: Optional region filter preset, e.g., 'europe'.
Optional era/time period preset value such as 'before_1500'.
Optional sort option key, e.g., 'visit_time_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an exhibit title or image in the list.
Click 'View Self-Guided Tour' after adding exhibits to the route.

access_methods.description: Header nav link labeled 'Exhibitions'.
Accessed from homepage promos and About page links highlighting collections.

pages.name: Exhibit Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single exhibit or gallery focused on cheese history.
primary_functions: Display full exhibit content including title, country, era, narrative text, images, and estimated visit time.
Show practical information such as gallery location within the museum.
Provide an 'Add to My Route' or 'Add to Self-Guided Tour' button to include this exhibit in the user’s route.
Offer navigation back to the filtered exhibits list and a shortcut to the My Route page.

incoming_params.description: Exhibit ID whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add to My Route' then 'View My Route'.
Click 'Back to Exhibitions' link or breadcrumb.

access_methods.description: Accessed via exhibit_detail.html?id={exhibit_id} when following exhibit links.
Linked from exhibit cards on the Exhibitions page and from featured exhibits on the homepage.

pages.name: Self-Guided Tour / My Route
pages.description: Overview and management page for a personalized self-guided tour through selected exhibits.
primary_functions: List all exhibits added to the self-guided tour, including country, estimated visit time, and order.
Allow users to set a route start time (e.g., 10:00 am) and show a calculated stop-by-stop schedule.
Provide an option to optimize or confirm the route to keep total visit plus walking time under a specified duration (e.g., 90 minutes).
Support reordering or removing exhibits from the route to fine-tune the self-guided tour.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an exhibit title within the route stop list.
Click 'Add more exhibits' call-to-action from the route overview.

access_methods.description: Header nav link labeled 'Self-Guided Tour'.
Linked from Exhibit Detail pages and the Exhibitions page after adding exhibits to a route.

pages.name: Tours & Workshops
pages.description: Listing page for all guided tours and cheese-related workshops, with separate views for each.
primary_functions: Provide tabbed or segmented controls to switch between 'Guided Tours' and 'Workshops' lists.
For guided tours, provide filters for date (including specific dates like 2026-08-10), language (e.g., English), price range, and sorting by duration.
For workshops, provide filters by month (e.g., June 2026), day of week (weekends), audience type (e.g., Family & Kids or Ages 8–12), and price.
List tours and workshops as cards with key information and affordances to open their detail pages.

incoming_params.description: Initial tab to show, e.g., 'guided' or 'workshops'.
Preselected date (YYYY-MM-DD) for guided tour filters, e.g., '2026-08-10'.
Language filter preset for guided tours, e.g., 'english'.
Month filter preset for workshops, e.g., '2026-06'.
Optional flag (e.g., 'true') to restrict workshop results to weekend sessions.
Audience type preset such as 'family_kids' or 'ages_8_12' for workshops.
Maximum price filter for tours or workshops (numeric string, e.g., '25' or '40').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a guided tour or workshop card.
Click cart icon from this page to review bookings in the cart.

access_methods.description: Header nav link labeled 'Tours & Workshops'.
Linked from homepage promos and newsletter content about programs.

pages.name: Program Detail (Tour or Workshop)
pages.description: Shared detail page template for individual guided tours and workshops.
primary_functions: Display full information for the selected tour or workshop, including description, themes, duration, price, language, and audience.
Show available dates and start times; allow users to select a specific session or date/time where applicable.
For guided tours, allow selection of ticket quantities by category (e.g., adults, children, seniors).
For workshops, allow selection of participant counts (e.g., adult and child participants) and collection of a contact or group name.
Provide a clear primary action (e.g., 'Book Tour' or 'Continue to Review') that proceeds to the booking review page.

incoming_params.description: Program (tour or workshop) ID to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Book Tour' or 'Continue to Review' after selecting session and participant counts.
Click 'Back to Tours & Workshops' breadcrumb.

access_methods.description: Accessed via program_detail.html?id={program_id} from tour/workshop listings and featured program links.

pages.name: Booking Review
pages.description: Summary page for reviewing a selected guided tour or workshop booking before confirmation.
primary_functions: Summarize the booking details including program name, date, start time, participant counts, and pricing.
Allow users to adjust ticket/participant quantities or change the selected session via links back to the program detail page.
Provide a confirmation action to finalize the booking step or add the booking to the cart if integrated with purchases.
Offer navigation onward to the cart and back to the Tours & Workshops listing if needed.

incoming_params.description: ID of the pending ProgramBooking to review.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add to Cart & View Cart' or similar action after finalizing booking with add_to_cart = true.
Click 'Back to Tours' or 'Browse more tours' link.
Click 'Change session or participants' link.

access_methods.description: Reached after submitting the booking details form on Program Detail.
Can be reloaded directly via booking_review.html?booking_id={booking_id}.

pages.name: Learn & Articles
pages.description: Learning resources hub with an integrated 'Articles' section and filters.
primary_functions: Introduce learning materials such as articles and possibly other resource types, highlighting the 'Articles' section.
Offer an 'Articles' button or section header that scrolls or focuses the user on the article list area.
Within the articles area, provide filters by topic/category (e.g., Aging & Maturation), time period (e.g., 1800–1950 range), and reading time (e.g., 10 minutes or less).
Display a list of articles matching the selected filters, supporting navigation to individual article detail pages.
Provide a link to the user's 'My Reading List' page.

incoming_params.description: Initial article topic filter, e.g., 'aging_maturation'.
Start year for time period filtering, e.g., '1800'.
End year for time period filtering, e.g., '1950'.
Reading time option key, e.g., 'max_10' to show articles 10 minutes or less.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article title or 'Read more' in the articles list.
Click 'My Reading List' link from the Learn page.

access_methods.description: Header nav link labeled 'Learn'.
Linked from homepage learning promos and About page references to educational resources.

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single article related to cheese history topics such as aging and maturation.
primary_functions: Present the full article content with title, author (if applicable), publication date, topic, time period, and estimated reading time.
Provide an 'Add to Reading List' or 'Save for Later' button to store the article in the user's reading list.
Allow removing the article from the reading list if it is already saved.
Offer navigation back to the filtered article list on the Learn page and to the My Reading List page.

incoming_params.description: Article ID whose details should be shown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'My Reading List' link in the article header or after saving the article.
Click 'Back to Articles' or breadcrumb link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via article_detail.html?id={article_id} from lists and promos.

pages.name: My Reading List
pages.description: Personal list of saved articles the user intends to read.
primary_functions: Display all articles the user has added to their reading list, with titles, topics, time periods, and reading time estimates.
Provide links to open each saved article’s detail page.
Allow users to remove articles from the reading list.
Optionally offer simple organization or printing options for the reading list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article title in the reading list.
Click 'Browse more articles' link.

access_methods.description: Header nav link labeled 'Reading List'.
Linked from Learn page and Article Detail page after adding items to the list.

pages.name: Timeline
pages.description: Interactive chronological timeline of cheese history with a personal pinned-events view.
primary_functions: Display an interactive, scrollable timeline of cheese-related events with zoom and date-range controls.
Allow users to set the visible era (e.g., 2500 BCE–1 CE or 1900–1950) via an era range slider.
Show event popovers when events are selected, including descriptive text and contextual information.
Provide a 'Pin to My Timeline' action in each event popover to save events to the user’s personal timeline.
Offer a 'My Timeline' tab or toggle within the same page that displays only the user's pinned events in chronological order.

incoming_params.description: Initial visible range start year, e.g., '-2500' for 2500 BCE.
Initial visible range end year, e.g., '1' or '1950'.
Optional era preset identifier defined by getTimelineConfig. Used instead of explicit year range.
View mode such as 'all' or 'my' to show the full or personal pinned timeline.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'My Timeline' tab to switch to the personalized view.

access_methods.description: Header nav link labeled 'Timeline'.
Linked from homepage 'Cheese Through Time' feature and About page history section.

pages.name: Shop
pages.description: Online shop for museum merchandise, including cheese history books.
primary_functions: Display product categories, including a 'Books' category that can be selected to show book products only.
Provide filters for book format (e.g., Paperback), topic/subject (e.g., European Cheese History, Cheese Science), user rating (e.g., 4 stars and up), and maximum price.
List filtered products with key details (title, price, rating) and 'Add to Cart' buttons from the product cards.
Allow users to add multiple books to the cart directly from the list.
Provide a link or icon to open the cart and view the shopping cart page.

incoming_params.description: Initial shop category, e.g., 'books'.
Book topic filter such as 'european_cheese_history' or 'cheese_science'.
Book format filter, e.g., 'paperback'.
Minimum rating threshold, e.g., '4'.
Maximum price filter for books, e.g., '30' or '25'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click cart icon or 'View Cart' link after adding products.

access_methods.description: Header nav link labeled 'Shop'.
Linked from homepage featured products and newsletter promotions.

pages.name: Cart & Visit Summary
pages.description: Unified cart and booking summary page for tickets, tours/workshops, and shop products.
primary_functions: Display all items currently in the cart, including museum entry tickets, guided tours, workshops, and shop products, with quantities and prices.
Allow users to update quantities or remove items from the cart.
Show an order summary with subtotals and overall total cost.
Provide shipping options for physical products, including a 'Standard Domestic' or 'Standard (5–7 days)' shipping method.
Serve as the 'Visit Summary' view for general admission bookings initiated from the Visit & Tickets page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add more tickets' or 'Continue browsing visits' from the cart.
Click 'Add a tour or workshop' from the cart.
Click 'Add more books' or 'Continue shopping' from the cart.

access_methods.description: Header nav link labeled 'Cart'.
Linked from Visit, Program Detail/Booking Review, and Shop after adding items.

pages.name: Newsletter Sign-Up
pages.description: Subscription page for the museum’s email newsletter with interest and frequency preferences.
primary_functions: Collect the user's email address and optional preferred language for newsletter communication.
Allow users to select content interests, including 'Ancient Cheese History' and 'Museum Events & Workshops'.
Provide a frequency selector to choose a 'Monthly Digest' or equivalent once-per-month option.
Submit the newsletter subscription and show confirmation or success messaging.
If additional preference steps are needed, allow users to review and save preferences on the same page before confirmation.

incoming_params.description: Optional prefilled email address for convenience, e.g., passed from a checkout or promo signup.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' after successful subscription confirmation.

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled 'Newsletter'.
Linked from homepage newsletter promos and possibly from the cart or confirmation pages.

pages.name: About the Museum
pages.description: Information about the Cheese History Museum’s mission, background, and focus.
primary_functions: Explain the museum’s mission, history, and focus on cheese history and culture.
Highlight key collections or exhibit themes to encourage exploration of the Exhibitions and Timeline sections.
Provide links to Visit information and other relevant sections such as Learn and Tours & Workshops.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Plan your visit' link from About page content.
Click links from key collections descriptions to 'Explore Exhibitions'.
Click 'Explore cheese history timeline' from About page.
Click 'Learn more about cheese history' links in About content.

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled 'About'.
Linked from homepage 'About the museum' teaser.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and inquiry form for the museum.
primary_functions: Display contact details such as address, phone number, and email addresses.
Provide a simple contact form for visitor questions, feedback, or special requests.
Offer links to Visit information (for directions) and Policies (for formal matters).

incoming_params.description: Optional prefilled subject line for the contact form, e.g., 'Ticketing question' or 'Workshop inquiry'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Visitor information & directions' link from Contact page.
Click 'View policies' link for formal terms and policies.

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled 'Contact'.
Linked from error handling messages or specific help prompts across the site.

pages.name: Policies
pages.description: Museum policies including privacy, terms of use, and ticketing/shop policies.
primary_functions: Present the museum’s privacy policy and terms of use for the website.
Outline ticketing policies such as refunds, exchanges, and booking conditions for visits, tours, and workshops.
Describe shop policies such as shipping, returns, and exchanges.
Provide contact information or links for users with questions about policies.

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor or ID (e.g., 'ticketing', 'shop', 'privacy') to scroll to on load.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us about this policy' link within any policy section.

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled 'Policies'.
Linked from cart, Visit, and Shop pages where policies are referenced.

header_links.description: Plan a visit and purchase museum entry tickets
View and manage your self-guided tour route
Explore cheese history with an interactive timeline
View articles saved to your reading list
Find guided tours and cheese workshops
Buy books and other cheese history merchandise
View your cart and visit summary with shipping options
